issue.message: Overriding `@attr/anchorAngleDegrees` which is marked as private in androidx.wear:wear:1.3.0. If deliberate, use tools:override="true", otherwise pick a different name.
Overriding `@attr/anchorPosition` which is marked as private in androidx.wear:wear:1.3.0. If deliberate, use tools:override="true", otherwise pick a different name.
Overriding `@attr/clockwise` which is marked as private in androidx.wear:wear:1.3.0. If deliberate, use tools:override="true", otherwise pick a different name.
